items.title: Free agent guard Jordan McLaughlin has agreed to a one-year, $3.3 million deal to return to the San Antonio Spurs, agent Greg Lawrence of THE•TEAM tells ESPN. McLaughlin appeared in 44 games for the Spurs last season and now enters his ninth campaign.

items.body_excerpt: Free agent guard Jordan McLaughlin has agreed to a one-year, $3.3 million deal to return to the San Antonio Spurs, agent Greg Lawrence of THE•TEAM tells ESPN. McLaughlin appeared in 44 games for the Spurs last season and now enters his ninth campaign.

items.title: Summer Pacers’ game-winning attempt was rejected. They were down 94-93 to Raptors and called a timeout with 12.5s left. Another thrilling finish.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Summer Pacers’ game-winning attempt was rejected. They were down 94-93 to Raptors and called a timeout with 12.5s left. Another thrilling finish.

Mast had 23/10 off the bench, Jalen Slawson added 21/8 and demonstrated his versatility. Braden Smith was scoreless, but dished 9asts.

items.title: FINAL: Knicks 86, Pistons 75. They fall to 1-2 overall. Another strong performance from Chaz Lanier (24 points, 8-12 from 3). Ebuka Okorie finished with 14 points, 6 rebounds and 4 assists but shot 5-18 overall. He's been adjusting to the physicality.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt: FINAL: Knicks 86, Pistons 75. They fall to 1-2 overall. Another strong performance from Chaz Lanier (24 points, 8-12 from 3). Ebuka Okorie finished with 14 points, 6 rebounds and 4 assists but shot 5-18 overall. He's been adjusting to the physicality.
